haiku: Cherry blossoms fall / soft upon the still pond's face / spring whispers hello
Cicadas buzzing / the heat shimmers on the road / summer afternoon
A tiger's deep eyes / burning bright in moonlit grass / silence before pounce
Your hand touches mine / two hearts flutter like sparrows / love in morning light
Old well in the woods / a cold hand pulls at my sleeve / fear without a sound
Snow falls on cedars / the world hushed and white and still / peace in winter's heart
Heat lightning flickers / no thunder to break the spell / summer night's secret
Tiger in the reeds / striped fire waiting for dusk / wild and alone
You whispered my name / and the cherry tree blushed pink / I bloomed in your love
Footsteps behind me / turning, only autumn leaves / the chill knows my name
Laughter by the stream / children chasing dragonflies / joyful summer song
The plum tree blossoms / even after the long frost / hope never forgets
A shadow crosses / moonlit tatami mats / tiger spirit walks
You are the sunrise / painting gold across my dark / love, my endless dawn
Eyes in the closet / a whisper from under the bed / childhood horror
Deep in the bamboo / a tiger's roar splits the mist / my heart beats faster
Summer watermelon / we spit seeds into the sun / sweet sticky fingers
First snow on the bridge / lovers sharing one scarf, warm / winter's gentle gift
The scarecrow's torn smile / crows ignore his empty threats / sad autumn sentry
A ghost in the rain / her wet hair drips on my neck / I can't look behind
Tiger paces cage / dream of jungle in his eyes / freedom tastes like rust
You fold origami / a paper crane of our love / fragile, yet it flies
Sea of golden grass / the sun drowns in horizon / tiger moth flutters
Empty house, floor creaks / but the clock still ticks alone / horror in patience
Morning glory blooms / even on a broken fence / joy finds a way
Your fingers through mine / like rivers meeting the sea / love's deep undertow
Tiger in snowfall / orange ember against white / fierce winter spirit
Under the full moon / a faceless woman singing / horror lullaby
Bare branches scratching / at a window full of stars / winter loneliness
Ripe persimmons glow / like tiny autumn lanterns / sweet season of gold
Tiger lily fire / in the garden after rain / petals like your lips
Shadows stretch too long / the scarecrow moves inch by inch / harvest moon dread
We laugh in the rain / forgetting umbrellas, soaked / young love knows no cold
Steam from green tea cup / cherry petals on the sill / a perfect moment
The tiger watches / from the tall grass, patient, still / time becomes a blade
A corpse of winter / buried under melting snow / reveals the first bud
My love, a lantern / guiding through the bamboo grove / even in deep fog
Drowned girl in the pond / her hair like silk waterweed / summer’s darkest bloom
Sparrows in the eaves / chirp gossip of the morning / small happinesses
Tiger's silent tread / pads brushing fallen petals / violence in grace
Icicle drips slow / counting down to a warm breath / winter gives way
You paint my name on / a rice paper lantern, love / we set it adrift
The old well whispers / names of those who fell before / moss muffles the screams
Summer storm, lightning / splits the ancient oak in two / raw power, then peace
Tiger eyes glowing / twin lanterns in the twilight / hunter becomes prey
Your smile warms the room / brighter than the winter hearth / love, my forever
Frost on the pumpkin / a scarecrow's breath makes a cloud / something is alive
A bee in the peony / drunk on summer's sweetness, falls / tiny joy, asleep
Tiger, your stripes are / bars of a burning prison / free me or consume
Rain on the gravestone / the name worn away to moss / forgotten horror
Winter solitude / I hear the snow falling, soft / on my own heartbeat
We plant a small seed / love, and water it with hope / summer sunflowers
The tiger leaps, fire / of muscle and stripe, a flash / death becomes a dance
Mist on the mountain / a shape that walks like a man / horror holds its breath
Candlelight and you / shadows waltz upon the wall / this happy evening
Autumn leaves tumble / a child's forgotten red ball / season of goodbyes
Tiger in the zoo / dreams of monsoons and wild boar / my cage is a skull
A door left ajar / darkness breathes out from the crack / childhood terror wakes
Warm rice and pickled plum / your hands placing it before me / love tastes like home
Summer's end, the cicada shell / clings to the bark, empty song / life's brittle echo
Tiger moth flutters / against the paper lantern / fighting the wrong moon
The mirror shows me / but your reflection smiles back / ghost of a lost love
Frog jumps, sound of water / old pond, a single ripple / joy in the small splash
Under winter stars / your breath mingles with my own / we are one cloud now
Tiger, in the dream / you spoke human words, then ate / I woke up screaming
Falling cherry blooms / like pink snow on the still world / a season's last gift
The hanged man's shadow / swings without a body now / horror in the noon
You leave, morning chill / but your tea cup still warm, love / parting's gentle ache
Sunflowers bow heads / heavy with the summer's gold / seeds of tomorrow
Tiger's roar echoes / through the misty valley; hearts / of deer freeze, then flee
Dolls in the attic / their glass eyes follow the dust / forgotten horror
First love, a firefly / cupped in trembling hands at dusk / brief light, lifelong glow
Winter plum blossoms / defiant against the snow / joy in stubbornness
Tiger, a furnace / of hunger in the bamboo / silence burns before
I hear a baby / crying in the empty house / but no one lives there
Your letter arrives / cherry petals pressed inside / love across the sea
Summer festival / goldfish swimming in a bag / fleeting happiness
Tiger stripe shadows / cast by the setting sun through / the cage of my ribs
A noose swings gently / from the cherry tree in bloom / horror and beauty
We share an umbrella / rain drums a soft lullaby / love in monsoon time
Deep winter, the fox / leaves a chain of neat paw prints / cold happiness
Tiger on the screen / painted two hundred years ago / still makes my heart jump
Footprints in the snow / lead to the frozen lake's edge / and then, just nothing
Your hair smells of rain / and crushed chrysanthemum, love / autumn's gentle gift
Morning glories close / by noon, they have said their piece / small joy, then goodnight
A tiger's soft yawn / reveals a cavern of teeth / fierce tenderness
The old doll's hand moves / it points at the bedroom door / horror, no wind blows
Harvest moon so bright / lovers meet in the rice field / secret happiness
Cicada shell clings / to the mossy stone lantern / summer's ghost remains
Tiger in the ink / wash painting, mist and claw / art captures the kill
Something in the swamp / bubbles with a human groan / horror in the peat
You tie my kimono / your fingers gentle as dawn / love in every fold
First spring thunder, heart / jumps, then laughter in the dark / season's loud hello
Tiger's whisker bent / in the temple incense smoke / prayer for a safe path
The corpse flower blooms / a stench of rotting angels / horror in perfume
Warm sake, your laugh / snow piles up outside, who cares? / winter happiness
A dragonfly rests / on a samurai's old helm / summer conquers war
Tiger in the stars / constellation of desire / I chart you by heart
I wake to a hand / cold on my ankle, then gone / horror in the blur
An ant carries spring / across the mossy stone step / tiny world builder
Salty ocean breeze / the fisherman's song at dawn / net full of silver
Grandmother's old house / the smell of fermented soy / nostalgia lives here
Fog erases bridge / a truck's headlights become eyes / of some sleeping beast
Friends clink sake cups / laughter spills onto the street / one more round, old friend
Crow on a scarecrow / wearing the straw hat himself / small crow, huge mischief
Chalk dust on my sleeve / a teacher's voice like a bell / goodbye, childhood desk
A mountain path, mist / I lose myself, then find me / soul's quiet return
City never sleeps / neon paints puddles with dreams / a stray cat blinks twice
The potter's wheel hums / clay rises into a cup / earth's patient heartbeat
Sparrow in the rain / shakes a puddle from its wing / sudden diamond burst
My father's silence / after I broke the blue vase / love shaped like a shard
A single candle / in the window of the inn / traveler, rest here
The old dog's grey snout / dreams of chasing rabbits still / paws twitch in the sun
Cherry tree in bloom / a spider web glistens pink / death wears a soft veil
Morning radio / crackle of a distant war / coffee turns bitter
River in the mist / a heron stands like a monk / one with the water
First bite of a peach / summer's sugar on my chin / sticky happiness
The calligraphy / brush drags ink like a dark cloud / kanji for
Midnight, a phone rings / it's a wrong number but we / talk until sunrise
Fallen ginkgo leaves / golden fans on the wet road / city turns antique
A baby's first step / wobble that shakes the whole world / small foot, giant leap
Deep ocean, angler- / fish lights its own little hell / loneliness glows bright
Sweeping temple steps / a monk flicks a beetle safe / compassion in straw
Punk rock in my ears / while the old pine tree sways slow / two kinds of rhythm
The scarecrow's pocket / a mouse has built a small nest / fear becomes a home
Rain on the tin roof / a symphony of small thumps / I forget my grief
The mirror's silver / shows a face I used to know / time's quiet thief
Washing rice, cold stream / grains slip like years through fingers / hunger and patience
A plastic bottle / floats past the sacred mountain / prayer flags flutter
Stars above the camp / we name constellations wrong / laughing at our maps
The old clockmaker / his shop of orphaned tick-tocks / each hour adopted
Cicada shell clings / to a broken traffic light / summer in the grid
Your photo, creased edge / still I feel your sunlit laugh / ghosts are made of light
A snake in the sun / uncoils a muscle of gold / cold blood warms slowly
Blizzard, the mailman / leaves footprints like a lost script / duty white and deep
Pot of tea, steam curls / two cups, but I sit alone / the tea stays bitter
Bamboo grove whispers / a thousand green flutes at dawn / wind's own orchestra
Old movie theatre / the velvet seats still hold warmth / of a thousand dates
Rusty bicycle / by the rice field, a child's laugh / still rings the bell
A whale's low moan cuts / through the dark ocean miles / loneliness so deep
Street musician plays / a worn-out accordion / coins fall like autumn
First frost on the moss / my old cat refuses to / go outside today
The poet's ink stone / ground to a perfect dark pool / a universe waits
Mushrooms after rain / a fairy circle of white / wonder, then doubt
A kite string snaps, child / watches his dragon wander / into the grey clouds
Sushi chef's fingers / pressing rice with memory / each grain a season
Subway at rush hour / faces buried in their glow / a silence so loud
Cherry petals fall / on the head of a statue / even stone feels spring
The lighthouse keeper / counts waves to fall asleep, but / never reaches sleep
A moth's powdery / last dance around the lantern / sacrifice for light
Abandoned station / a vending machine still hums / waiting for no one
Grandfather's war flag / folded in a cedar chest / silk still holds his breath
Wind chimes on the porch / the summer breeze says hello / and goodbye at once
The butcher's cleaver / falls, a chicken's dream ends / life feeds on life
A comet, so rare / people make wishes, but you / just watch, speechless, awed
The blacksmith's hammer / reshapes iron like a prayer / fire and muscle hymn
After the funeral / we ate oranges in silence / grief tastes of sweet juice
Morning glory vine / has conquered the whole mailbox / small blue victory
A monk strikes the bell / the sound ripples through the pines / stillness after tone
Lost in a new town / I follow the scent of bread / home finds me again
Icicle dagger / pointed at the sleeping earth / winter's threat, then drip
Two crabs on a rock / claws raised like tiny boxers / the ocean laughs foam
A torn love letter / words
in the mud / rain heals what it blurs
The old woman's hands / shape mochi with winter strength / sticky white full moons
Nighthawk's sudden dive / a mouse's last squeak, then dark / hunger is a star
A child draws a sun / with purple rays and a smile / the world bends to art
Spring cleaning, I find / a dead bee on the window / dust of a small life
Fog on the harbor / a ship's horn moans like a cow / lost in the white field
The old master's bow / draws a note that holds the night / violin and void
A single sandal / floating in the irrigation ditch / summer mystery
Hospital window / a patient watches clouds race / freedom has soft shapes
The scarecrow wears my / father's old coat, buttons shine / like a second ghost
Rainy afternoon / I build a paper boat fleet / childhood sails again
The fisherman's wife / mends the net with a small lamp / her patience is sea
Frog contemplates / a haiku on the moon's face / then jumps, sound of splash
A crow's feather drifts / onto a samurai's grave / black snow on the stone
Midnight fridge light spills / I stand eating cold noodles / secret happiness
Dandelion fluff / a child's wish disperses on / the indifferent wind
The old car won't start / so we push and laugh, breath plumes / winter friendship warms
A blind musician / fingers the braille of guitar strings / music feels like light
Apartment balcony / a single tomato plant / red hope in the grey
Snow on the Buddha / his stone smile grows a white beard / enlightenment cold
Shinkansen blurs rice / fields into gold streaks, I yawn / journey between worlds
The coal miner's cough / black dust settled in his laugh / son carries the lamp
Cicada's last scream / summer's soundtrack ends abrupt / silence is too loud
Old library smell / dust and paper, a million / minds asleep, but live
A stray dog follows / me for three blocks, then he leads / we both find a bench
The baker's white dust / a ghost of flour on his cheek / he hands me warm bread
Sunset on the lake / a heron turns silhouette / day folds into night
Origami crane / from my father's hospital / bed, still able to fly
Monsoon, the road drowns / a rickshaw puller muscles / through, his legs are bronze
Stars in a puddle / the whole cosmos underfoot / step gently, my friend
A scarecrow slumps, straw / gut spills, winter wind picks teeth / the field's skeleton
The tea master's whisk / chases the matcha to foam / a green universe
Holding my mother's / hand, it's become so light, like / a dried autumn leaf
Out of toilet paper / I use a haiku notebook / art sacrifices all
Fireworks above / the river, a carp jumps once / to join the bright death
The old train station / bench shaped by a thousand waits / I add my own wait
Smartphone screen glows blue / a face reflected, no eyes / digital hollow
Satellite blinks red / crossing a sea of cold stars / human ambition
Phoenix from the ash / a single feather ignites / renewal burns bright
Robot arm welds steel / sparks like tiny shooting stars / factory heartbeat
Traffic jam at dusk / a thousand red taillights glow / collective sigh
Dragon coils the peak / breathing mist and ancient snow / myth sleeps in the stone
Your voicemail again / I speak to the beep, silence / love in the cloud
Toothache, midnight drill / of pain, a tiny demon / carving through my jaw
Shogi piece, a knight / jumps over pawns and worries / old man plays himself
Astronaut's helmet / reflecting Earth, so small, blue / homesick in a void
Spilled coffee, brown map / spreading on the meeting notes / a caffeine continent
Kitsune's nine tails / sway in the torii gate light / a trickster's smile
ICU monitor / green peaks and valleys of life / a family waits
Elevator pitch / twenty floors of awkward silence / strangers count the lights
Vending machine glow / offers comfort in a can / lonely salaryman
Tide pool universe / starfish, anemone, crab / cosmos in a cup
Old cassette rewinds / hiss of forgotten love songs / magnetic ghost
Unicorn in mist / silver horn touches the lake / purity is myth
Courage, a small flame / cupped against a howling gale / one step, then the next
Pixelated sky / 8-bit clouds and green hills roll / childhood loads again
Forgotten password / I am locked out of my life / digital exile
Jellyfish pulsing / deep-sea lanterns without flame / silent alien
The tailor's needle / dives and surfaces like a / silver minnow, mends
Broken umbrella / in the typhoon's angry breath / trash samurai
Kraken in the deep / ships vanish with a bubble / old maps whisper fear
Morning yoga, breath / fills the room, cat stretches too / downward facing dog
Envy, green as moss / creeping up my heart's stone wall / your sun warms, I rot
Rocket launch, the ground / trembles, we look up as one / collective hope's roar
Typewriter keys jam / the poet's curse, ink-stained nails / delete was a dream
Samurai's tea bowl / chipped, repaired with gold, still holds / imperfection's glow
Penguin huddle, warmth / against the Antarctic knife / father holds the egg
Drone flies over fields / farmer's eye in the grey sky / harvest from above
Guitar string snaps, twang / silence fills the smoky room / a note left unsung
Boredom, a thick fog / clock hands have forgotten speed / dust motes float like thoughts
Scarecrow wears my face / I see myself in the field / straw heart, still waiting
Tsunami siren / the sea inhales, then exhales / a wall of dark glass
Llama on the hill / unimpressed by the sunrise / chewing ancient grass
Electric scooter / whirs past the temple bell's toll / two ages collide
Mermaid on the rock / combing seaweed from her hair / sailors call it love
Shame, a hot red stain / spreading from the missed word, wrong / burning in the dark
Power grid at night / veins of light across the map / civilization's pulse
Cicada drone, drone / the soundtrack of a heat stroke / fan blades chop the air
VR headset on / I climb Everest, but trip / over my own cat
Autumn, a Monet / brush of rust and gold on pond / impressionist sky
Sorrow, a slow leak / from somewhere behind the ribs / I bail with a spoon
Octopus dreaming / colours ripple on her skin / mind in every arm
Flamingo ballet / pink legs in the soda lake / grace in harsh beauty
Haunted floppy disk / a novel trapped in plastic / cursor blinks, waiting
Zen garden, rake lines / a single fallen maple leaf / perfection disturbed
Street food, sizzling / octopus balls, takoyaki / bonito flakes dance
Self-driving car glides / no hands on the wheel, just trust / an algorithm's prayer
Monk's wooden bowl, empty / he fills it with stream water / meal of sun and stone
Thunderstorm, dog hides / under the bed, shivering / I whisper old myths
Firefly jar, holes poked / childhood's lantern glows then fades / I free them at dawn
Ramen steam, pork bone / broth, a hug in a bowl, slurp / lonely winter cured
Graffiti on the train / a tiger leaps across steel / wild art in motion
Grandpa's hearing aid / whistles, we talk louder still / love shouts, never mutes
Lunar eclipse, slow / the moon swallows its own light / then spits it back red
Panic attack, walls / breathe, I count five things I see / floor, chair, hand, light, breath
Koala in the gum / tree, high on eucalyptus / perpetual nap
Sushi chef's knife gleams / a sliver of salmon, laid / on pearl rice, a prayer
Double rainbow, arc / a second, fainter promise / sky's after-image
Desert, a lizard / does push-ups on a hot rock / tiny sun-worshipper
Silence between us / after the argument, loud / as a slammed door's ghost
Factory smokestack / a cloud factory, making / grey sheep for the sky
Newborn's cry, first breath / the room forgets how to sleep / joy is a loud noise
Chess game by the park / old men argue, pieces fall / pigeons keep the score
Aurora borealis / green curtains, the sky's quiet / dance, we watch, tiny
Mold on the bread, blue / universe of tiny spores / I toast it, risk life
Crane, origami / folds from my lover's letter /
Subway busker's voice / echoes in the tiled tunnel / coins fall like applause
Neon sign,
flickers / one letter dies,
/ meaning still survives
Exhausted mother / asleep with a picture book / the story reads her
Asthma, a tight fist / in my chest, I breathe through straw / world shrinks to one breath
Dandelion seeds / a paratrooper brigade / invading my lawn
Van Gogh's ear, a tale / sunflowers still scream yellow / beauty understands
Bubble wrap, pop, pop / symphony of tiny stress / relief in plastic
Drought, the river bone / cracked mud, a fish fossil grins / cloud's empty promise
Mime trapped in a box / we see the walls he cannot touch / art of the unseen
Swarm of honeybees / a living thunder in air / the queen moves, they flow
Fountain pen leaks ink / a black tear on the white page / the novel begins
Gargoyle on the roof / rain pours from its stone grimace / protector of drains
The actor forgets / his line, the stage holds its breath / a whisper from wing
Hunger, a knot twists / in the gut, a wolf clawing / ramen shop, I run
Bonsai, tiny pine / three hundred years of patience / shaped by wire and love
Jazz club, saxophone / wails, a smoke-filled tear falls in / a glass of whiskey
Laundry on the line / socks argue with the wind's pull / domestic haiku
Volcano, the earth / clears its throat, a rumble, then / fiery oration
Polar bear on ice / shrinking white beneath its paws / climate elegy
The programmer stares / at the bug, a missing semicolon / worlds fail on a dot
Hitchhiker's thumb, road / a stranger trusts a stranger / shared silence, then thanks
Paper cut, a sting / a tiny red line screams loud / finger becomes saint
Gingko leaf, a fan / yellow, flutters to the curb / the last autumn note
To-do list, unchecked / the day has escaped again / I make a new list
Karaoke room / a salaryman screams his heart / into a cheap mic
Tumbleweed ballet / across the empty main street / the town holds its breath
Lost luggage, carousel / goes round, my bag goes somewhere else / a small tragedy
Alarm clock, I hit / snooze, dreaming of a world where / mornings are gentle
Magnolia bloom / a heavy pink cup, too full / petals spill like wax
Microscope lens shows / a tardigrade lumbering / moss piglet cosmos
Abandoned theme park / a rusted carousel horse / still gallops in wind
Olive tree, ancient / gnarled hands of a thousand years / pressing oil from stone
Jealousy, green snake / coils around the throat, squeezes / words meant to be love
Skateboard kickflip fails / teenage gods of concrete pray / to a bruised elbow
Ferris wheel at dusk / cabins swing like lantern fruit / city's slow exhale
Steam locomotive / hisses goodbye at the platform / coal smoke, a black flag
Diver's lungs, a pearl / held breath in the blue silence / the oyster's secret
Pigeon on the wire / coos a grey philosophy / I toss it a crumb
Tornado's finger / touches down, erasing barns / sky's rude signature
Abacus clicks, beads / arithmetic in wood, slow / calculator's dream
Strawberry moon hangs / low and pink above the pines / summer's sweetest blush
Potter's hands, wet clay / a bowl emerging like dawn / from the spinning dark
Eel in the river / a slick muscle of shadow / lightning without flash
Forgotten birthday / calendar's empty square stares / I buy my own cake
Honeybee's last sting / sacrifices its small life / for the hive's heartbeat
Fugu chef's knife stills / a single wrong incision / death is on the plate
Mosquito's whine, thin / needle of sound in the dark / slap, a red full stop
School bell, final ring / a corridor of echoes / childhood packed away
Bamboo scaffolding / a spiderweb of green poles / city grows upward
Milky Way above / a river of spilled sugar / we are in the splash
Gas station at dawn / fluorescent loneliness hums / coffee, bitter, black
Pantomime artist / pulls an invisible rope / I see the knot, wait
Ancient bog body / tannin skin, a leather book / with no more pages
Vinyl record spins / static whispers between tracks / a needle's journey
Dust devil, small twist / of hay and hot air, dances / across the fallow field
Monk's begging bowl, full / of alms, a single radish / gratitude's light weight
Leviathan's fin / slices the horizon line / whale-song in the deep
Pneumatic tube, whoosh / a love note shoots through the bank / antique velocity
Junkyard, a dog barks / at a moon of rusted hubcaps / guardian of scrap
Sleep paralysis / a weight sits on my chest, breathes / I can't move a toe
Sparrow's dust bath, wings / fling fine earth into the sun / tiny cloud of joy
Ice cream truck's jingle / a ghost of summer passing / the street melts with kids
Meteor crater / a scar where the sky punched earth / rain fills it with stars
Grandma's false teeth grin / from a glass on the nightstand / she dreams of steak
Spilled ink on tatami / a black lake spreads, the writer / bows to the mistake
Geiger counter clicks / a silent wolf in the air / invisible teeth
Sphinx, your riddle solved / but the sand still swallows you / a lion's smile fades
Dandelion wine / bottled sunshine from last year / a sip of spring day
Scorpion's tail arcs / a question mark in the sand / the answer is pain
Sweat lodge, stones glow red / the darkness sings an old song / breath becomes a prayer
Lighthouse, I climb / the spiral staircase of stars / the lamp is a heart
Cinnamon challenge / laughter, coughs, a cloud of spice / regret coats the tongue
Aurora, green veil / shimmer of the solar wind / sky wears the sun's ghost
Zombie cicada / fungus has replaced its mind / still it sings to mate
Old spice merchant's box / cinnamon, cardamom ghosts / scent of the silk road
Rocking chair, empty / still moves on the porch, a push / from a gone hand's ghost
Speedskater's blade cuts / a perfect oval of cold / silence after the bell
Tea ceremony / a single bubble pops, sound / of the world ending
Junk mail,
, I tear it, then pause / hope is a paper shred
Nautilus shell, spiral / a golden ratio of deep / the ocean's blueprint
Black hole, gravity / swallows even the light's scream / a hungry nothing
Orchid mantis prays / pink petal with a scythe / beauty is the trap
Bakery at 4 am / the first bread's heat fights the cold / a yeasty sunrise
Gratitude, a bowl / of simple miso soup, warmth / in the winter bones
Procrastination / I clean the fridge to avoid / the blank page staring
Drystone wall, moss green / a lizard does push-ups where / a warrior once stood
Kintsugi bowl, gold / in the cracks, the breakage is / what makes it sacred
Fire ant raft, a live / island floating on the flood / collective fury
Paper lantern drifts / across the summer river / a wish that can't swim
The bodybuilder / poses, a bronze statue of / ego and protein
Canyon wren's song, drops / down the sheer cliff like a stone / a cascade of notes
First contact, they came / not with war but with a gift / of their own silence
Laundromat, spin cycle / a lonesome sock's orbit round / its lost partner's ghost
Cherry tree, old friend / I visit your blossom, you / visit my grey hair
Glacier calving, boom / a blue cathedral collapses / into the sea's sigh
The typist's mistake /
world is slightly off-kilter / a small apocalypse
Street dog's single bark / defends a territory / of a cardboard box
Coral spawning, a / blizzard of pink and white eggs / the reef makes love, blooms
Soy sauce, a dark drop / spreads on the white tablecloth / a tiny continent
Paraglider, silk / wing catches a thermal's breath / for a moment, god
Mosque at dawn, the call / to prayer lifts, pigeons scatter / the dome holds the note
Cactus, a green fist / shaking at the blazing sun / blooms a pink surprise
Fisherman mends net / a lifetime of knots and holes / the sea gives, takes, gives
Tarot card, The Fool / steps off the cliff, a small dog / barks a warning, laugh
Automatic door / opens for the stray cat's tail / a brief VIP
Pinball wizard's wrist / flips the silver ball, lights flash / tilt, the world resets
Coal miner's canary / a yellow lung in the dark / sings until it can't
Hailstorm on the roof / a thousand tiny drummers / playing chaos jazz
Desiccated leaf / a skeleton of summer / crumbles in my hand
Hypnosis, swinging / watch, my mind becomes a soft / clock melting over branch
Sword swallower's throat / accepts the blade, we hold breath / the steel kisses life
Pangolin, pinecone / beast, rolls into an armored / ball, dream's gentle knight
Rusty nail, tetanus / a silent stalker in the / sole of a bare foot
Zen garden, sand raked / into waves that never crash / mind's ocean, dry, calm
Stunt kite loops, dives, screams / a fabric falcon on strings / the wind's wild puppet
Oil spill, rainbow sheen / on the black water, beauty / masks a dying breath
The contortionist / ties herself into a knot / the audience unspools
Fig wasp, tiny life / crawls inside the fruit to die / the sweetness owes a debt
Pogo stick, bounce, creak / a child conquers gravity / for three seconds, flight
Frozen mammoth, tusk / emerges from melting ice / a ghost of an age
Barcode scanner beeps / the language of commerce, one / potato, now a code
Crow funeral, a mob / of black wings caws at the dead / we stop, watch, wonder
The insomniac / counts the hours by the streetlight's / flicker, a morse code
Glow stick cracked, neon / green flows through the rave, a short / life of brilliant light
Sumo wrestler's stomp / shakes the ring, the earth, the gods / a salt cloud blessing
Mushroom cloud, a bloom / of fire and death, a second / sun, then a long night
Guitar pick, lost, found / under the sofa cushion / a chord's resurrection
The clock's hands spin backwards / I watch my youth return, but / it only lasts an hour
Lawn flamingo stands / on one leg, the other holds / a tiny pink grenade
A door in the sky / opens, stairs of cloud unroll / no one climbs, just stares
Grandma's soup, a pearl / of garlic and star anise / the broth tastes of home
The mannequin's hand / moves an inch, I blink, it's still / department store dread
Vending machine sells / canned bread, I buy it, hot, sweet / the future is soft
Fireflies sync their / lights to my heartbeat, a morse / code from the meadow
Old dog's dream, paws twitch / chasing rabbits made of mist / we all chase the fog
Moon's reflection drinks / from the lake, a silver tongue / lapping up the stars
Sweater unravels / a thread pulls me into a / ball of yarn and winter
The scarecrow proposes / to a passing cloud, it rains / a bridal bouquet
Sunflower bends to / whisper a secret to the / fence, it's about bees
